news.t: Hedgeye Asset Management Launches the Hedgeye 130/30 Equity ETF (HELS) Managed by R. Patrick Kent

holdings.infoBox: HELS is an equity ETF with a total of 89 individual holdings. The top holdings are OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES stock at 20.13%, First American Government Obligations Fund Class X at 5.63%, UnitedHealth Group at 3.00%, CSX Corporation at 2.82%, and Eli Lilly and Company at 2.76%.

overview.description: The Hedgeye 130/30 Equity ETF (HELS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively manages a 130/30 long-short US all-cap equity strategy. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation designed to outperform broad long only equity benchmarks. HELS was launched on Dec 10, 2025 and is issued by Hedgeye.

data.title: Hedgeye Asset Management Launches the Hedgeye 130/30 Equity ETF (HELS) Managed by R. Patrick Kent
data.text: STAMFORD, Conn. , Dec. 12, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Hedgeye Asset Management , LLC ("HAM"), a subsidiary of Hedgeye Risk Management, LLC, today announced the launch of the Hedgeye 130/30 Equity ETF (HELS)...
